title: Whistle
overview: Ram, a pizza delivery boy, marries his girlfriend Anu after she gets pregnant. The story takes a curious turn when Ram, who visits Smitha Bungalow to deliver pizza. The drama that follows in the haunted house is linked to diamonds. It’s a remake of Tamil blockbuster 'Pizza'.
